1️⃣ LOADING SCREEN:
- Logo with #00F5FF glow and pulse animation (scale 1 → 1.05 → 1)
- Brand name with gold gradient (#FFD700 → #FFA500)
- Rotating messages every 2 seconds
- Progress bar with gradient (#00F5FF → #7B2FF7) and glow
- Hashrate counter (0 TH/s → 120 TH/s)
- Security messages (SSL Secured, 256-bit Encryption)
- Loading duration: 3.5 seconds

2️⃣ LOGIN PAGE:
- PIN field with eye icon (show/hide toggle)
- Login button: gradient #6A11CB → #2575FC with glow hover
- Create Account button: gradient #FF0080 → #7928CA
- Loading state: 'Connecting to Mining Network...'

3️⃣ STATISTICS SECTION:
- 6 counters: Total Users, Online Users, Total Deposited, Total Withdrawn, Active Miners, Daily Profit
- Each with specific gradient colors as specified
- 2 cards per row on mobile, 4 on desktop
- Hover glow + zoom effect

4️⃣ BUTTON DESIGNS:
- Deposit: #00F260 → #0575E6 (rounded pill)
- Withdraw: #FF512F → #DD2476 (rounded pill)
- Referral: #00DBDE → #FC00FF (rounded pill)
- All with hover glow + zoom effects

5️⃣ BRAND NAME EFFECT:
- Gold gradient text (#FFD700 → #FFA500)
- Soft pulse animation
- Glow effect

6️⃣ MOBILE OPTIMIZATION:
- Full width buttons
- Statistics 2 per row
- Smooth animations

❌ NO mining logic changed
❌ NO packages changed
❌ NO referral system changed

- 2 seconds duration

PART 2 - Wallet Login System:
- 6-digit PIN authentication
- Session management in localStorage
- Auto login if session exists
- Register with referral code support

PART 3 - Premium Login Page:
- Hero section with platform stats
- Glassmorphism login card
- Trust features icons
- Responsive mobile layout

PART 4 - Mining System:
- 4% daily profit calculation
- 30 days duration, 120% total return
- Per-second mining: deposit * 0.04 / 86400
- Live counter with smooth animation

PART 5 - Mining Visual Features:
- Live mining counter
- Circular progress indicator
- Mining status badge (Active/Completed)
- Progress bar with gradient

PART 6 - Transaction History:
- Date, Type, Amount, Status columns
- Deposit, Withdrawal, Mining Reward, Referral types
- Status badges color-coded

PART 7 - Deposit/Withdraw Rules:
- Min Deposit: 5 USDT
- Min Withdraw: 3 USDT
- BEP20 network only
- Admin approval required

PART 8 - Referral System:
- 7% direct referral commission
- Unique referral link per user
- Referral earnings tracking
- Copy link functionality

PART 9 - Footer Design:
- USDT Mining Lab branding
- Menu links: Home, Dashboard, Terms, Support
